title: Unable to select "board" when add one to a workspace
excerpt: I’m trying to create a new board within a workspace. All the options can’t be selected when I try.  This is the case for all add new options. I’m the owner and admin on the account if that helps.

posts.author: JoeErvinErgo (Joe Ervin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m trying to create a new board within a workspace. All the options can’t be selected when I try. This is the case for all add new options. I’m the owner and admin on the account if that helps.

Screenshot 2025-02-06 at 12.25.22 PM540×516 90.3 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: That looks like a glitch. Have you tried clearing cookies, opening a new browser?
